uk: Свв. мучеників Акиндина, Пигасія, Афтонія, Єлпидифора й Анемподиста.
saints.en: Sts. Martyrs Acindynus, Pegasius, Aphthonius, Elpidephorus & Anempodistus

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизми нема. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 Октоїха, 3 мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мчч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. мчч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар мчч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря мчч. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і мчч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний мчч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря мчч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. мчч.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – мчч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 1 Сол. 267 зач.; 2, 20 – 3, 8. Єв. – Лк. 59 зач.; 11, 29-33.

troparion_en.text: Blessed is the earth that received your blood, Passion-bearers of the Lord, / and holy is the dwelling place which received your spirits. / You triumphed over the enemy in the stadium / and you preached Christ with boldness. / Since He is good, we pray that you beseech Him to save our souls.

kontakion_en.text: You have received into the enjoyment of Your goodness and repose, O only Good One, / the pious and God-bearing martyrs, who abandoned all earthly things: / Acindynus, Pegasias, and Anempodistus, / together with Aphthonius and Elpidephorus.

matched_oca_saint: Martyrs Acindynus, Pegasius, Aphthonius, Elpidephorus, Anempodistus, and 7,000 with them, of Persia

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Acindynus, Pegasius, Aphthonius, Elpidephorus, Anempodistus, and 7,000 with them, of Persia

troparion.text: Blessed is the earth that received your blood, Passion-bearers of the Lord, / and holy is the dwelling place which received your spirits. / You triumphed over the enemy in the stadium / and you preached Christ with boldness. / Since He is good, we pray that you beseech Him to save our souls.

kontakion.text: You have received into the enjoyment of Your goodness and repose, O only Good One, / the pious and God-bearing martyrs, who abandoned all earthly things: / Acindynus, Pegasias, and Anempodistus, / together with Aphthonius and Elpidephorus.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Marcian, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: “Ozerianka” Icon of the Mother of God of Shuiu-Smolensk

troparion.text: O Most Pure Virgin Theotokos, /  the All-Good and Merciful Protector of the Christian race,  / we kneel before your Holy wonderworking Icon,  / by which the city of Shuya was once delivered from a cruel epidemic, /  we humbly cry out to you:  / “Do not cease to keep your city from troubles and tribulations under the protection of your kindness, /  and all the towns and villages of the Russian land;  / and pray to your Son, Christ God,  / for the salvation of our souls.”

kontakion.text: Steadfast protectress of Christians, / most constant advocate before the Creator,  / do not despise the voices of us who have sinned,  / but in your goodness come speedily to help us, who cry to you in faith:  / “Hasten to intercede for us, O Theotokos, /  and speedily make supplication, for you always protect those who honor you.”
